hints.text: Arctic archipelago under **Norway** (counts as Norway); plates are **black w/ yellow text**
**Barren, treeless mountains**; only moss & grass, no trees; usually overcast & gloomy
**Russian** sometimes on signs (old Soviet mining settlements)
3 towns: **Longyearbyen** = largest, boxy minimalist buildings; **Pyramiden** = abandoned Soviet blocks + pyramid-shaped mountains; **Barentsburg** = desolate, multi-coloured apartment blocks
